text: The provided implementation of Bellman-Ford algorithm is incorrect because it updates the edge weights instead of node distances. The failure output shows that node distances remain infinite except the source, which indicates the relaxation step was wrongly applied. Instead of updating edge weights, the algorithm should update the shortest path estimates stored in weight_by_node during relaxation.

data.label: The implementation of shortest_paths is incorrect as it updates edge weights instead of node distances.
Tests fail asserting that many nodes have infinite distance instead of expected finite values.
The Bellman-Ford algorithm requires updating node distance estimates, not edge weights.
